rationale: Gov't Code §2001.1775 governs agency modification of findings during judicial review of contested cases. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Except as provided by Section 2001.175(c), an agency may not modify its findings or decision in a contested case after proceedings for judicial review of the case have been instituted under Section 2001.176 and during the time that the case is under judicial review.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns administrative contested-case procedure, not property tax exemptions.
